---
title: "About ExpreSEd"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{About ExpreSEd}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(eval = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
```
## What is ExpreSEd?
ExpreSEd is a package that provides a streamlined pipeline for differential expression analysis using SummarizedExperiment objects, and raw counts data and sample metadata files. Input bulk RNA-seq data, and ExpreSEd will output an optimal filter threshold matrix, log2-fold change shrunken differential analysis results, a summary of expression patterns, and a volcano plot.  ExpreSEd is compatible with R, command line, Docker, and Nextflow programs.

## Workflow
```{r, echo=FALSE, fig.cap="Your caption", out.width="80%", fig.align="center"}
knitr::include_graphics("workflow.png")
```

## Package Components
```r
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ DESCRIPTION
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ ExpreSEd.Rproj
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ LICENSE
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ LICENSE.md
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ NAMESPACE
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ R
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ DESeq2_analysis.R
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ ExpreSEd-package.R
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ data-documentation.R
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ determine_filter_threshold.R
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ export.R
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ filter_low_exp_gene.R
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ shrinkage.R
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ summarize_genes.R
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ volcano_plot.R
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ README.Rmd
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ README.md
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ _pkgdown.yml
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ data
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ example_se.rda
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ data-raw
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ example_se.R
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ inst
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ example_outputs
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ de_results.tsv
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ de_summary.tsv
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ filtering_diagnostics.tsv
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ volcano_plot.pdf
в”‚       в””в”Ђв”Ђ volcano_plot.png
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ exec
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ ADS8192.R
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ man
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ ExpreSEd-package.Rd
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ determine_filter_threshold.Rd
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ example_se.Rd
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ export_outputs.Rd
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ filter_low_exp_genes.Rd
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ gene_regulation_summary.Rd
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ generate_volcano.Rd
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ log2_shrinkage.Rd
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ run_DESeq2.Rd
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ tests
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ testthat
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ test-DESeq2_analysis.R
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ test-determine_filter_threshold.R
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ test-export.R
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ test-filter_low_exp_genes.R
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ test-shrinkage.R
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ test-summarize_genes.R
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ test-volcano_plot.R
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ testthat.R
в””в”Ђв”Ђ vignettes
    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ about.Rmd
    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ cli-analysis.Rmd
    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ cli-analysis.html
    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ getting-started.Rmd
    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ prebuilt_data.RData
    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ r-analysis.Rmd
    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ r-analysis.html
    в””в”Ђв”Ђ workflow.png
```
---

## Reflection

### Key Aspects/ Takeaways

- Specify GitHub commits
- Writing functions, creating a package, and operating containers

### Future Work

- Alter R pipeline input to accept raw count and sample meta data.
- Combine R, CLI and nextflow workflows into a single branch
